Node.help: Session is a platform for manipulating tests. Multiple users can connect to the same session. Tests are created, loaded and saved from here.

PropertyNode.name: runningTest
PropertyNode.help: The currently running test configuration. Do not edit.

PropertyBoolean.name: doWaitLinkUp
PropertyBoolean.description: Wait for links to come up after applying configuration

PropertyBoolean.name: doGratArp
PropertyBoolean.description: Do grat arp after applying configuration and the links are up

PropertyBoolean.name: doInterfaceCheck
PropertyBoolean.description: After applying the configuration check that interfaces are ready for use

Method2.name: SetErrorInjectionTags
Method2.help: Hook for enabling various error injection modes. Used for internal unit testing of various failure conditions

Argument.name: i_errorTags
Argument.help: list of error tags to be injected

Method2.name: SetCardsSupportedByApplication

Argument.name: supportedCardList
Argument.help: A list of card description strings E.g. '10/100/1000 ALM T8'

Method2.help: The application can constrain the available card types by calling this function after creating a TestServer Session object. If the card is not in the supplied list, the card it is not made available for use.

Method2.name: SetPluginsSupportedByApplication

Argument.name: supportedPluginList
Argument.help: A list of plugin description strings E.g. 'EthernetPlugin'

Method2.help: The application can constrain the plugin types by calling this function after creating a TestServer Session object. If the plugin is not in the supplied the list, it is not made available for use.

Method2.name: ClearHardwareTimeStamp
Method2.help: Clears the hardware timestamp

PropertyBoolean.name: waitForLinkUp
PropertyBoolean.description: This flag should be set if links are to be checked after configuration

Method2.name: ConfigureTest
Method2.help: Applies the configuration to the ports.

Method2.name: DeconfigureTest
Method2.help: Removes the previously applied configuration.

Method2.name: StartTest
Method2.help: Starts the configuration. Should be called before the application starts using the configuration.

Method2.name: StopTest
Method2.help: Stops the configuration. Is called by the application to stop the configuration.

Method2.name: CancelTest
Method2.help: Cancels the state machine action and empties the event queue.

Method2.name: CloseTest
Method2.help: Closes the test object.

Struct.name: TestInfo
Struct.help: This structure holds information about a test.

Member.name: userName
Member.help: The username associated with the test.

Method2.name: Ping
Method2.help: Trivial method for checking connectivity.

Method2.name: Close
Method2.help: Close this session. Discards all associated data.

Method2.name: CreateTest
Method2.help: Create a new test under this session. Displaces any test already in the session.

Method2.name: DeleteTest
Method2.help: Delete a test in the database.

Method2.name: RenameTest
Method2.help: Rename a test in the database.

Method2.name: OpenTest
Method2.help: Open a test from the database. This will displace a pre-existing test in the session.

Method2.name: OpenTestByName
Method2.help: Open a test from the database. This will displace a pre-existing test in the session.

Method2.name: OpenTestResult
Method2.help: Open a test result from the database. This will displace a pre-existing test in the session.

Argument.name: testResultId
Argument.help: Unique id of the test result.

Method2.name: OpenTestResultByName
Method2.help: Open a test result from the database by file name. This will displace a pre-existing test in the session.

Argument.name: filename
Argument.help: File name of the test result.

Method2.name: GetTestList
Method2.help: Retrieve a list of tests from the database.

Argument.name: testName
Argument.help: Name of the test or empty string. [?]

Argument.name: testInfoList
Argument.help: Returned list of test information structures.

Method2.name: GetTestResultList
Method2.help: Retrieve a list of test results from the database.

Argument.name: testName
Argument.help: Name of the test or empty string. [?]

Argument.name: testInfoList
Argument.help: Returned list of test information structures.

Method2.name: GetAppName
Method2.help: Retrieve the name of the application the session was created for.

Method2.name: GetTestXml
Method2.help: Retrieve XML representation of a test in the database.

Method2.name: GetTestResultXml
Method2.help: Retrieve XML representation of a test result in the database.

Argument.name: xml
Argument.help: XML representation of the test result.

Method2.name: SetPortGroupDefault
Method2.help: Set the xml used to initialize new port groups

Argument.name: xml
Argument.help: The xml used to initialize new port groups

Enum.name: eEventType
Enum.help: The list of events being reported by SystemEvent

Event.name: PostConfigError
Event.help: This error is thrown if something goes wrong after configure

Argument.name: errorMessage
Argument.help: This event is triggered by post configure errors. The errorMessage explains the error

Struct.name: EventData
Struct.help: Structure containing argument data for SystemEvents

Member.name: eventType
Member.help: The type of event being reported

Argument.name: eventData
Argument.help: The type of event being reported

Method2.name: SetUserName
Method2.help: (Re)set the user name for apply this session object

Argument.name: userName
Argument.help: New User name to apply to this session object

Method2.name: SetActivityModels
Method2.help: Method to set the activity model

Argument.name: activityModels
Argument.help: List of avtivity models to set

Method2.name: GetActivityModels
Method2.help: Method to get the list of activity models

Method2.name: CreateTestServerUnitTestNode
Method2.help: For internal unit test only

Method2.name: AddLicense
Method2.help: Activates licensed plug-in. For Ixia applications use only.

Argument.name: featureId
Argument.help: License Id of plug-in to enable.

Method2.name: Internal_EnableActionBehaviorMessages
Method2.help: Note: This is an internal Unit test method. Turn on or off ActionBehaviorMessage collection

Argument.name: enable
Argument.help: The enabler parameter for the call

Method2.name: Internal_GetActionBehaviorMessages
Method2.help: Note: This is an internal Unit test method. Get all action behavior internal log messages.
